name: Otsuka Kagu, Ltd.
summary: Otsuka Kagu, Ltd. provides furniture and interior products in Japan. It offers sofas, dining chairs and tables, bed mattresses, living tables, TV boards, book shelves, shelves, cupboards, storage furniture, desks/desk chairs, study desks, kids furniture, personal and reclining products, curtains, illuminations, carpets and rugs, beddings, interior and outlet goods, and reworth products. The company offers its products through retail stores and online. Otsuka Kagu, Ltd. was founded in 1969 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
